name: Kelp
description: A kelp forest swaying in the current — strands grow, shrink and lean together whenever the tide (seed) turns.

code.style: --frond1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --frond2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --k1: @rand(40%, 96%); --k2: @rand(30%, 80%); --sway1: @rand(-22deg, 22deg); --sway2: @rand(-22deg, 22deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 30%; bottom: 0; width: 9%; height: var(--k1); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--frond1); transform: skewX(var(--sway1)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 58%; bottom: 0; width: 9%; height: var(--k2); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--frond2); transform: skewX(var(--sway2)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
